evals.prompt: Write tasks for checkout-foundation (CHK01) from work/checkout-foundation/design.md — Gherkin AC for each task.
evals.expected_output: work/checkout-foundation/tasks.md with canonical task schema and ≥1 Gherkin scenario per task.
assertions: Every task includes Acceptance (Gherkin) with Given/When/Then
No new epics added to backlog.md

evals.expected_output: Verdict sprint-ready / acceptable with amendments / not ready with checklist.
assertions: Checks Gherkin presence and observable Then clauses
